productDisplayName: Disney Kids Girl's Orange Stripe Kidswear
description: Composition:100% cotton white and orange striped top and orange shortsWashcare:Machine wash in cold water with a gentle cycle using mild detergent. Wash dark colours seperately. Do not bleach. Do not soak nor wring. Dry it inside out. Do not tumble dry. Do not iron on print and studs.Fitting:Comfort FitYour little princess is sure to look and feel cool in this orange and white striped top and orange pair of shorts from disney. A frilly, orange front-cut collar and white frills lining the short pockets accentuate that chilled-out look, while Pooh keeps up the fun mood.
